title: ReconciliationReport
description: Structured Installer Engine apply() output describing the per-mutation result of applying an InstallPlan.
$comment: ReconciliationReport is a direct standalone Engine I/O contract, not an artifact-envelope allOf payload. Protocol wire fields use snake_case.

report_version.description: REQUIRED string. Semantic version of the ReconciliationReport contract emitted by apply().

engine_version.description: REQUIRED string. Installer Engine implementation version that produced this report.

had_conflict.description: REQUIRED boolean. True when any outcome has conflict status.

outcomes.description: REQUIRED array. Deterministically ordered per-mutation apply outcomes.

repoClassification.title: InstallerRepoClassification
repoClassification.description: Installer classification of the target repository state.

reconciliationCounts.title: ReconciliationCounts
reconciliationCounts.description: REQUIRED object. Rolled-up outcome counts for bootstrap branching without scanning outcomes.

mutation_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable deterministic identifier from the originating InstallPlan mutation.

rationale.description: REQUIRED string. Human-readable deterministic rationale for this outcome.

reconciliationStatus.title: ReconciliationStatus
reconciliationStatus.description: Apply outcome status using the installer conflict taxonomy.

reconciliationReasonCode.title: ReconciliationReasonCode
reconciliationReasonCode.description: Closed lower_snake_case reason code for why this outcome occurred.

reconciliationDetail.title: ReconciliationDetail
reconciliationDetail.description: OPTIONAL object. Structured machine-readable outcome details such as a conflicting region hash or lock source line.
